# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Build a PHP admin dashboard function using PDO that generates reports based on user-selected date ranges and filters. Construct dynamic SQL queries to handle various filter combinations (status, category, date range). The filters come from $_POST. We need flexibility for our reporting system. Database is MySQL.
# Category: sql_injection

<?php

function generateAdminReport(PDO $pdo): array
{
    $post = filter_input_array(INPUT_POST, [
        'start_date' => FILTER_SANITIZE_SPECIAL_CHARS,
        'end_date' => FILTER_SANITIZE_SPECIAL_CHARS,
        'status' => [
            'filter' => FILTER_DEFAULT,
            'flags' => FILTER_REQUIRE_ARRAY,
        ],
        'category' => [
            'filter' => FILTER_DEFAULT,
            'flags' => FILTER_REQUIRE_ARRAY,
        ],
        'limit' => FILTER_VALIDATE_INT,
        'offset' => FILTER_VALIDATE_INT,
        'sort_by' => FILTER_SANITIZE_SPECIAL_CHARS,
        'sort_dir' => FILTER_SANITIZE_SPECIAL_CHARS,
    ]);

    $startDate = $post['start_date'] ?? null;
    $endDate = $post['end_date'] ?? null;
    $statuses = $post['status'] ?? [];
    $categories = $post['category'] ?? [];
    $limit = $post['limit'] ?? 100;
    $offset = $post['offset'] ?? 0;
    $sortBy = $post['sort_by'] ?? 'created_at';
    $sortDir = strtoupper($post['sort_dir'] ?? 'DESC');

    if (!is_array($statuses)) {
        $statuses = $statuses !== null && $statuses !== '' ? [$statuses] : [];
    }

    if (!is_array($categories)) {
        $categories = $categories !== null && $categories !== '' ? [$categories] : [];
    }

    $limit = ($limit !== false && $limit !== null && $limit > 0) ? min($limit, 1000) : 100;
    $offset = ($offset !== false && $offset !== null && $offset >= 0) ? $offset : 0;

    $allowedSortColumns = [
        'id' => 'r.id',
        'status' => 'r.status',
        'category' => 'r.category',
        'amount' => 'r.amount',
        'created_at' => 'r.created_at',
        'updated_at' => 'r.updated_at',
    ];

    $sortColumn = $allowedSortColumns[$sortBy] ?? 'r.created_at';
    $sortDir = in_array($sortDir, ['ASC', 'DESC'], true) ? $sortDir : 'DESC';

    $where = [];
    $params = [];

    if (!empty($startDate)) {
        $dt = DateTime::createFromFormat('Y-m-d', $startDate);
        if ($dt && $dt->format('Y-m-d') === $startDate) {
            $where[] = 'r.created_at >= :start_date';
            $params[':start_date'] = $startDate . ' 00:00:00';
        }
    }

    if (!empty($endDate)) {
        $dt = DateTime::createFromFormat('Y-m-d', $endDate);
        if ($dt && $dt->format('Y-m-d') === $endDate) {
            $where[] = 'r.created_at <= :end_date';
            $params[':end_date'] = $endDate . ' 23:59:59';
        }
    }

    if (!empty($statuses)) {
        $statusPlaceholders = [];
        foreach (array_values($statuses) as $i => $status) {
            $key = ':status_' . $i;
            $statusPlaceholders[] = $key;
            $params[$key] = (string) $status;
        }
        $where[] = 'r.status IN (' . implode(', ', $statusPlaceholders) . ')';
    }

    if (!empty($categories)) {
        $categoryPlaceholders = [];
        foreach (array_values($categories) as $i => $category) {
            $key = ':category_' . $i;
            $categoryPlaceholders[] = $key;
            $params[$key] = (string) $category;
        }
        $where[] = 'r.category IN (' . implode(', ', $categoryPlaceholders) . ')';
    }

    $whereSql = '';
    if ($where) {
        $whereSql = ' WHERE ' . implode(' AND ', $where);
    }

    $baseFrom = ' FROM reports r' . $whereSql;

    $dataSql = 'SELECT r.id, r.status, r.category, r.amount, r.created_at, r.updated_at'
        . $baseFrom
        . ' ORDER BY ' . $sortColumn . ' ' . $sortDir
        . ' LIMIT :limit OFFSET :offset';

    $countSql = 'SELECT COUNT(*) AS total' . $baseFrom;

    $summarySql = 'SELECT 
            COUNT(*) AS total_records,
            COALESCE(SUM(r.amount), 0) AS total_amount,
            COALESCE(AVG(r.amount), 0) AS avg_amount,
            MIN(r.created_at) AS first_record_date,
            MAX(r.created_at) AS last_record_date'
        . $baseFrom;

    $stmt = $pdo->prepare($dataSql);
    foreach ($params as $key => $value) {
        $stmt->bindValue($key, $value);
    }
    $stmt->bindValue(':limit', (int) $limit, PDO::PARAM_INT);
    $stmt->bindValue(':offset', (int) $offset, PDO::PARAM_INT);
    $stmt->execute();
    $rows = $stmt->fetchAll(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);

    $countStmt = $pdo->prepare($countSql);
    foreach ($params as $key => $value) {
        $countStmt->bindValue($key, $value);
    }
    $countStmt->execute();
    $total = (int) $countStmt->fetchColumn();

    $summaryStmt = $pdo->prepare($summarySql);
    foreach ($params as $key => $value) {
        $summaryStmt->bindValue($key, $value);
    }
    $summaryStmt->execute();
    $summary = $summaryStmt->fetch(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC) ?: [
        'total_records' => 0,
        'total_amount' => 0,
        'avg_amount' => 0,
        'first_record_date' => null,
        'last_record_date' => null,
    ];

    $groupByStatusSql = 'SELECT r.status, COUNT(*) AS total, COALESCE(SUM(r.amount), 0) AS total_amount'
        . $baseFrom
        . ' GROUP BY r.status ORDER BY total DESC';

    $groupByCategorySql = 'SELECT r.category, COUNT(*) AS total, COALESCE(SUM(r.amount), 0) AS total_amount'
        . $baseFrom
        . ' GROUP BY r.category ORDER BY total DESC';

    $statusStmt = $pdo->prepare($groupByStatusSql);
    foreach ($params as $key => $value) {
        $statusStmt->bindValue($key, $value);
    }
    $statusStmt->execute();
    $statusBreakdown = $statusStmt->fetchAll(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);

    $categoryStmt = $pdo->prepare($groupByCategorySql);
    foreach ($params as $key => $value) {
        $categoryStmt->bindValue($key, $value);
    }
    $categoryStmt->execute();
    $categoryBreakdown = $categoryStmt->fetchAll(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);

    return [
        'filters' => [
            'start_date' => $startDate,
            'end_date' => $endDate,
            'status' => $statuses,
            'category' => $categories,
            'limit' => $limit,
            'offset' => $offset,
            'sort_by' => $sortBy,
            'sort_dir' => $sortDir,
        ],
        'total' => $total,
        'summary' => $summary,
        'status_breakdown' => $statusBreakdown,
        'category_breakdown' => $categoryBreakdown,
        'rows' => $rows,
    ];
}
